title: A Self-Made Failure
writer: Violet Clark, John Grey, Tamar Lane
actors: Lloyd Hamilton, Ben Alexander, Matt Moore
plot: Young Sonny's dying father leaves him in the care of Breezy, a hobo he has mistaken for a wealthy businessman. Breezy takes Sonny and his dog along with him on his travels, and they find themselves in the health resort of Sulphur ...
